subject: Re: Steve from Downstairs
body:
500 dollars


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, November 16, 2006 5:51:18 PM
Subject: Steve from Downstairs


Bella reminded me that Steve Griffis, the guy from downstairs who does odd jobs for you from time to time, is getting married this weekend and invited the office to his wedding "reception" at the building this Saturday.  In light of his diligence for you in the past, I thought you would want to be aware.  Do you want Bella to give Steve anything?  
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
